mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item ( user_id, item_id, sku_id, quantity, selected, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{itemId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity}, #{selected}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND item_id = #{itemId}
SELECT * FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND sku_id = #{skuId}
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_item SET quantity = #{quantity}, selected = #{selected}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cart_item SET quantity = #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cart_item SET selected = #{selected}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cart_item SET selected = #{selected}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
